sources.title: Ragtime Cowboy Joe 1940 colorized (Johnny Mack Brown)
sources.description: When a cattle rustler (Dick Curtis) kills a rancher, he accuses a stranger (Johnny Mack Brown) of the crime. But the stranger, who was actually sent by the Cattleman's Protective Association, escapes being lynched, reunites with an old girlfriend (Lynn Merrick), and learns of the scheme to steal the ranch from the dead man's daughter (Nell O'Day). With Fuzzy Knight as the titular cowboy and songs by Captain Bob Crawford and the Texas Rangers. I colorized this using AI software that doesn't always get the colors right, but I think it looks fairly natural. Hopefully a more professional job will be done someday.

metadata.Plot: When Sam Osborne, owner of the Circle S Ranch, is killed by cattle rustler Bo Gillman, the outlaw is advised by crooked attorney Virgil Parker to report the "mysterious" killing to Osborne's daughter, Helen. Steve Logan, a stranger, is jailed for the crime. He escapes and learns of Parker's scheme to steal the Circle S. Steve presents his Cattleman's Protective Association credentials to the sheriff and receives assurances of aid. Steve's former sweetheart, Mary Curtis, confirms Parker's treachery. In a gun battle, Parker, Gillman and the rustlers are rounded up and the Circle S is saved for Helen. Steve and Mary take up their romance again.
metadata.Actors: Johnny Mack Brown, Fuzzy Knight, Nell O'Day
